column1: # DSFB Oil & Gas — Drilling Domain Schema Template
# Domain: Rotary drilling torque monitoring (MPD / conventional).
# Physical channel: torque residual in kN·m.
#   timestamp         : s (elapsed from spud or Unix epoch)
#   observed_torque   : kN·m — from top-drive or rotary table sensor
# Physics note: stick-slip events produce SlewSpike tokens in DSFB.
# DSFB does not distinguish the physical cause; it structures the residual signal only.
